assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Configures Saturday maintenance window with --maintenance-window-start '2024-01-06T02:00:00Z' and --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Provides four quarterly exclusions (Q1-Q4) each with approximately 15-17 day periods using no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Configures November audit exclusion from 2024-11-01 to 2024-12-01 with no_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Shows chaining multiple exclusions for extended audit period with Part 1 and Part 2, mentions 48h gap requirement in 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: While it shows manual upgrade commands, it doesn't explicitly explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Recommends Extended release channel and explains it provides 24-month support with manual minor upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: All exclusion commands include --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time parameters

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Mentions tracking version drift, deprecation insights, and notes that persistent exclusion tracks EoS dates to avoid forced upgrades
